descriptions: Oroville Mono Boys is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Alliance, Asian Crips, Asian Family Gangsters, Fresno Bulldogs, Hmong Nation Society, Junior Criminal Crips, Laotian Posse, Oriental Ruthless Boys, Oroville Mono Boys, Ruthless Crip Gangsters, Tiny Rascal Gang

descriptions: Resuttana was part of Partanna-Mondello mandamento before being split off.
edges.evidence_quote: their territory was initially under the jurisdiction of the Partanna-Mondello mandamento ruled by Rosario Riccobono

descriptions: Mongols consider Iron Order as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.

descriptions: Cártel del Centro is a splinter group of Beltrán-Leyva Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: La Mano Con Ojos y Cártel del Centro en Estado de México y Ciudad de México.

descriptions: Los Negros split into independent groups including Cártel del Centro.
edges.evidence_quote: se han dividido en diferentes grupos independientes como ... Cártel del Centro

Red Brigades.description: Italian far-left Marxist-Leninist militant group formed in 1970, seeking a revolutionary state through armed struggle. Responsible for numerous violent attacks during Italy's Years of Lead, including the kidnapping and murder of former prime minister Aldo Moro in 1978. The group was broken up in the 1980s but saw a resurgence in the late 1990s to 2000s.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan was involved in paying ransom for a kidnapping by the Red Brigades.
edges.evidence_quote: il rapimento da parte delle Brigate Rosse dell'assessore campano Ciro Cirillo, rilasciato il 24 luglio 1981 dopo il riscatto che sarebbe stato pagato con i soldi portati dalla cordata Nicoletti-Casamonica

'Ndrina Giampà.description: The 'Ndrina Giampà is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in the Nicastro district of Lamezia Terme, Italy. It emerged in the late 1980s under the leadership of Francesco Giampà, known as 'Il professore', who won a violent feud against a rival faction. The organization is involved in drug trafficking (cocaine and marijuana) and arms trafficking. It was a key player in the Lamezia Terme feud from 2002 to 2011, which resulted in numerous murders.

descriptions: Accorinti has ties with Giampà 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli accorinti hanno legami con la 'ndrina dei Giampà di Lamezia Terme

descriptions: The Giampà refused to help the Cracolici against the Bonavota, indicating a non-hostile relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: i quali avrebbero chiesto aiuto ai Giampà , che non si sono resi disponibili in quanto non avrebbero voluto fare 'sgarbo' ai Bonavota

descriptions: Giampà and Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri were once a single organization but split and became rivals in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: A partire dal 2002, a seguito della sentenza del processo Primi passi i locali di 'ndrangheta dei Cerra-Torcasio-Gualtieri e quello dei Giampà, che un tempo costituivano un'unica organizzazione criminale, a seguito di una grave scissione interna diventano protagonisti di una cruenta guerra di mafia.

descriptions: Giampà (with Iannazzo) made peace with Torcasio-Gualtieri in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2015 con l'operazione Andromeda viene fatta luce sulla pace tra gli Iannazzo-Giampà ed i Torcasio-Gualtieri avvenuta anche grazie alla mediazione di clan del reggino.

descriptions: Dattilo is listed as an ally of Giampà in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Dattilo, Iannazzo

descriptions: Iannazzo is listed as an ally of Giampà in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Dattilo, Iannazzo

descriptions: Giampà is mentioned alongside Iannazzo-Daponte-Cannizzaro in the same operation.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione Quinta Bolgia della DDA che porta a 24 ordinanze di custodia cautelare per la cosca degli Iannazzo-Daponte-Cannizzaro e Giampà

descriptions: Iannazzo-Daponte-Cannizzaro and Giampà are mentioned together as part of the same criminal network.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 12 novembre 2018 si conclude l'operazione Quinta Bolgia ... per la cosca degli Iannazzo-Daponte-Cannizzaro e Giampà che fanno riferimento a Vincenzo Torcasio

descriptions: Iannazzo is allied with Giampà.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei Giampà e Cannizzaro-Daponte

descriptions: Iannazzo and Giampà are allied against Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra.
edges.evidence_quote: tra i Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra e gli Iannazzo - Giampà

descriptions: Torcasio is in a feud with Giampà.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2000 scoppia una faida ( faida di Lamezia Terme ) che si trascina ancora oggi tra i Torcasio-Gualtieri-Cerra e gli Iannazzo - Giampà

descriptions: Torcasio made peace with Giampà in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Viene fatta luce anche sulla pace tra gli Iannazzo - Giampà ed i Torcasio-Gualtieri

descriptions: Overlords attacked Indian Posse, which retaliated with a drive-by shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: On the night of 9 February 1994, a rival gang called the Overlords fired a shotgun at an Indian Posse house, leading to a drive-by shooting in retaliation a few hours later that left a woman wounded.

descriptions: Manitoba Warriors absorbed the Overlords gang.
edges.evidence_quote: the need for allies led to the Warriors to absorb the Overlords gang into their ranks

descriptions: TTP sent fighters to Syria to fight alongside Ansar al-Tawhid.
edges.evidence_quote: the TTP's media wing ... claimed to have ... sent hundreds of fighters to Syria to fight alongside ... Ansar al-Tawhid

descriptions: The Tito and Dino Cartel is listed as an ally of the Kinahan Organised Crime Group in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tito and Dino Cartel

descriptions: The US cited close ties between the Tito and Dino Cartel and the Kinahan Organised Crime Group.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2023 Edin Gačanin was sanctioned by the US who cited "close ties" to the Irish Kinahan Organised Crime Group and a €350m cocaine plot.

descriptions: Dallas youth supported Taliban in 2006 conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Taliban were also supported by the Baghdad Boys, Sakina youth, and Dallas youth.

descriptions: Los Chapitos y Los Dámaso estuvieron en conflicto armado en 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: La pugna derivó en un conflicto armado entre las facciones leales a Dámaso López (conocidos como Los Dámaso ) y los seguidores de Los Chapitos.

descriptions: Gypsy Joker MC amalgamated with Mandamas MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Following a friendly amalgamation with the notorious South Australian formed Mandamas MC and Gypsy Joker MC.

Clan Lubrano-Ligato.description: Italian Camorra organization operating in Pignataro Maggiore, Caserta province. Founded in 1965 by Vincenzo Lubrano, it maintained close ties with the Nuvoletta clan and Cosa Nostra, including Totò Riina. The Ligato faction became dominant after the decline of the original Lubrano leadership. As of recent investigations, only the Ligato faction remains active.

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan is listed as a rival of the Casalesi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lubrano-Ligato clan

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan committed murders on orders from the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Abate, collaboratore di giustizia, ed il capoclan Ligato, a cavallo tra gli anni '70 e 90, commisero 477 omicidi, per ordine della Banda della Magliana , di Cosa nostra e del clan Nuvoletta .

descriptions: The Casalesi clan killed Raffaele Lubrano, a member of the Lubrano-Ligato clan, in a conflict over supremacy.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2002, il clan dei Casalesi ha ucciso Raffaele Lubrano, figlio di Vincenzo. Secondo gli inquirenti, l'omicidio è stato deciso dalla fazione Schiavone per riaffermare la supremazia dei Casalesi.

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan committed murders on orders from the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Il pentito Abate, collaboratore di giustizia, ed il capoclan Ligato, a cavallo tra gli anni '70 e 90, commisero 477 omicidi, per ordine della Banda della Magliana , di Cosa nostra e del clan Nuvoletta .

descriptions: The Lubrano family was very close to the Orlando clan, with Lubrano sons being trusted by boss Antonio Orlando.
edges.evidence_quote: Oltre ai rapporti storici con i Nuvoletta, la famiglia Lubrano è stata anche molto vicina agli Orlando , e secondo le indagini, i figli di Gaetano Lubrano, Armando, Raffaele e Vincenzo, sarebbero i principali fiduciari del boss Antonio Orlando.

descriptions: The Lubrano family had very close ties with the Corleonesi, as evidenced by Riina attending a wedding.
edges.evidence_quote: I rapporti tra la famiglia Lubrano e i Corleonesi erano così stretti che Riina partecipò da latitante al matrimonio di Gaetano Lubrano, in compagnia di altri mafiosi come Leoluca Bagarella e Giuseppe Calò .

descriptions: The Lubrano-Ligato clan was an ally of the Nuvoletta clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Lubrano-Ligato clan (defunct)

descriptions: Corleonesi allied with Nuvoletta, Lubrano-Ligato, and Gionta.
edges.evidence_quote: Elementi di spicco dei Corleonesi ... si allearono con i clan camorristici dei Nuvoletta , Lubrano-Ligato e Gionta

descriptions: Polverino clan is allied with Lubrano-Ligato clan per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Nuvoletta clan, Orlando clan, Mallardo clan, Lubrano-Ligato clan, Licciardi clan, Cosa Nostra

descriptions: 400 Mawozo and Chen Mechan clashed in 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: In April–May 2022, clashes between the rival gangs, 400 Mawozo and Chen Mechan, occurred in the Plain of the Cul-de-Sac area.

descriptions: Black Sheep MC is listed as a rival of Bullshit MC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC Morticians MC, Black Sheep MC, Galloping Goose MC (Denmark)

descriptions: Clan Lago fought a violent war against Clan Contino for control of drug dealing and extortion.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli inizi degli anni novanta e i primi anni del decennio successivo hanno visto il clan Lago contrapporsi in una violenta guerra dapprima contro il clan Contino

Sumiyoshi-kai.description: The Sumiyoshi-kai is the second-largest yakuza group in Japan, based in Tokyo. Founded in 1958 by Jusaku Abe, it operates as a confederation of smaller gangs with a loose chain of command. The group engages in protection rackets in upscale districts like Kabukichō and Ginza. As of 2020, it had an estimated 2,100 members.

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai was a member group of the Kanto-kai coalition.
edges.evidence_quote: The organization was formed of seven yakuza groups (including the Sumiyoshi-kai and Matsuba-kai)

descriptions: Kokusui-kai and Sumiyoshi-kai were engaged in violent conflict over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The suicide followed a rash of shootings and retaliations between Kokusui-kai and a rival gang, Sumiyoshi-kai, over gang territory, including the shooting death of Sumiyoshi-kai's boss.

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai and Inagawa-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama ... Shuji Ogawa ... and Kazuya Uchibori ... held a social gathering.

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai is a principal clan of the Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Principal clans: Yamaguchi-gumi, Sumiyoshi-kai, Inagawa-kai

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi are rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Structurally, the Sumiyoshi-kai differs from its main rival, the Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Shootings occurred between Sumiyoshi-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Police stated that they were probing for possible links between the murder and a series of shootings between the Sumiyoshi-kai and the Yamaguchi-gumi in neighboring Tochigi Prefecture.

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai retaliated against Yamaguchi-gumi after a boss was shot.
edges.evidence_quote: Within hours the offices of the Yamaguchi-gumi were fired upon in retribution.

descriptions: Tensions rose between Sumiyoshi-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi after a suicide.
edges.evidence_quote: raising tensions between the Sumiyoshi-kai and the Yamaguchi-gumi.

descriptions: Toa-kai and Sumiyoshi-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi and Sumiyoshi-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama ... Shuji Ogawa ... and Kazuya Uchibori ... held a social gathering.

Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb.description: Islamist militant organization active in North Africa, originating as the Salafist Group for Preaching and Combat (GSPC) in Algeria. It rebranded as AQIM in 2007 and is aligned with al-Qaeda. Engages in insurgency in the Maghreb and Sahel, funding itself largely through kidnapping for ransom. In 2017, its Sahara branch merged with other groups to form Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

descriptions: AQIM is a direct affiliate of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: Al-Qaeda has the following direct affiliates: - Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (AQIM)

descriptions: Al-Qaeda likely approved the group's name and franchised its label to AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamist rebels in the Sahara calling themselves al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb stepped up their violence in the years before 2009. French officials say the rebels have no real links to the al-Qaeda leadership, but this has been disputed. It seems likely that bin Laden approved the group's name in late 2006, and the rebels 'took on the al-Qaeda franchise label', almost a year before the violence began to escalate.

descriptions: AQAP and AQIM are allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (2009–present)

descriptions: AQAP's newspaper featured content from other al-Qaeda affiliates, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: interviews and messages from leaders in Al-Qaeda core, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, Al-Qaeda in the Indian Subcontinent and Al-Shabaab being featured

descriptions: Al-Mourabitoun split from AQIM in 2012 and rejoined in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 2015, Belmokhtar's splinter group, Al-Mourabitoun rejoined AQIM, according to audio statements released by both groups.

descriptions: Al-Mourabitoun was a battalion within AQIM from 2015 to 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Al-Mourabitoun Battalion (2015-2017)

descriptions: AQIM listed Al-Mulathameen as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Al-Mulathameen (2012–2013)

descriptions: AQIM is a branch of al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: al-Qaeda in the Lands of the Islamic Maghreb ... is an Islamist militant organization (of al-Qaeda) active in North Africa.

descriptions: AQIM listed al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula (2009–2017)

descriptions: AQIM listed Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Al-Qaeda in the Sinai Peninsula (2007–2017)

descriptions: AQIM listed Ansar al-Sharia (Libya) as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Ansar al-Sharia (Libya) (2012–2017)

descriptions: AQIM listed Ansar al-Sharia (Tunisia) as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Ansar al-Sharia (Tunisia) (2011–2017)

descriptions: AQIM's Sahara branch merged with Ansar Dine into JNIM.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 March 2017, the Sahara branch of AQIM merged with Macina Liberation Front, Ansar Dine, and al-Mourabitoun, into Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

descriptions: AQIM listed Ansaru as an ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... Ansaru (2012–2017)

descriptions: AQIM, al-Shabaab, and Boko Haram attempted to coordinate activities as of June 2012.
edges.evidence_quote: According to U.S. Army General Carter Ham, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, the Somalia-based Al-Shabaab, and the Nigeria-based Boko Haram were as of June 2012 attempting to synchronize and coordinate their activities in terms of sharing funds, training and explosives.

descriptions: AQIM listed Islamic State Libya Province as an opponent in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Non-state opponents Islamic State Libya Province

descriptions: AQIM's Sahara branch merged into JNIM.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 March 2017, the Sahara branch of AQIM merged with Macina Liberation Front, Ansar Dine, and al-Mourabitoun, into Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

descriptions: AQIM's Sahara branch merged with Macina Liberation Front into JNIM.
edges.evidence_quote: On 2 March 2017, the Sahara branch of AQIM merged with Macina Liberation Front, Ansar Dine, and al-Mourabitoun, into Jama'at Nasr al-Islam wal Muslimin.

edges.target: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa
descriptions: Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa is a splinter group from AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: In late 2011, the splinter group Movement for Oneness and Jihad in West Africa was founded in order to spread jihadi activities further into West Africa. Their military leader is Omar Ould Hamaha, a former AQIM fighter.

descriptions: Sahara Emirate Brigade was a group within AQIM until 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: ... Sahara Emirate Brigade (until 2017)

descriptions: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade is a group within AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups: Uqba ibn Nafi Brigade

descriptions: Al-Shabaab has forged ties with AQIM.
edges.evidence_quote: has forged ties with other insurgent groups like AQIM and AQAP

descriptions: Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb was an ally of Boko Haram from 2007 to 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies ... al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb (2007–2015)

descriptions: Boko Haram maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the UN Security Council listing of Boko Haram under the al-Qaeda sanctions regime in May 2014, the group 'has maintained a relationship with AQIM for training and material support purposes'.

descriptions: IS lists AQIM as a non-state opponent, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Other non-state opponents: al-Qaeda, al-Nusra Front, Al-Qaeda in the Arabian Peninsula, Al-Qaeda in the Islamic Maghreb, Al-Shabaab, Taliban, Hamas, Hezbollah, Houthis, Kurdistan Workers' Party, Syrian Democratic Forces, ...

descriptions: The Badalamenti family was a primary rival of the Corleonesi.
edges.evidence_quote: The Corleonesi's primary rivals were Stefano Bontade , Salvatore Inzerillo and Tano Badalamenti , bosses of various powerful Palermo Mafia families.

descriptions: Barriox13 has conflicts with WSP.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has had conflicts with several rivals, including Piru gangs such as CPP, WSP, and 135th St Piru, although tensions have recently calmed.

descriptions: The UVF is listed as an opponent of the Provisional IRA in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: United Kingdom British Army , Royal Ulster Constabulary , Ulster loyalist paramilitaries Ulster Volunteer Force , Ulster Defence Association

descriptions: Krieger Verwandt is listed as an ally of SAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Krieger Verwandt , Silent Aryan Warriors

Camera di controllo.description: The Camera di Controllo is a collegial body of the 'Ndrangheta, a Mafia-type organization in Calabria, Italy. Established after the Second 'Ndrangheta war (1985-1991) to settle disputes and coordinate activities among clans. It is composed of leading members and functions as a hierarchical superordinate authority. The body has contributed to a decrease in homicides in the Reggio Calabria province.

descriptions: Camera di Controllo is a governing body within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camera di Controllo (Board of Control), is a collegial body of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Camera di Controllo is a commission of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: He became a member of Camera di Controllo , a provincial commission of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Camera di controllo is a management and control body of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La Camera di controllo o Camera di compensazione sono degli organismi di gestione e controllo della 'Ndrangheta al di fuori della Calabria adottati sin dagli anni settanta.

descriptions: Camera di controllo in Canada was created to avoid conflicts with American Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: Fin dagli anni sessanta esiste in Canada una camera di controllo voluta dai boss italo-americani di origine calabrese Frank Costello e Albert Anastasia per evitare contrasti con Cosa Nostra americana.

descriptions: Camera di Controllo is modeled after the Sicilian Mafia Commission.
edges.evidence_quote: The body, also referred to as the Commission in reference to its Sicilian counterpart

descriptions: The Canadian Camera di Controllo coordinates activities and resolves disputes for the Siderno Group.
edges.evidence_quote: A Camera di Controllo also exists in Canada, according to 'confidential information' of the police 'which they believe to be reliable.' It consists of six or seven Toronto-area men, who co-ordinate activities and resolves disputes among the Siderno Group in Southern Ontario.

descriptions: The Commisso 'ndrina became a member of the Camera di controllo after the Second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: They were members of Camera di controllo , a provincial commission of the 'Ndrangheta formed at the end of the Second 'Ndrangheta war in September 1991, to avoid further internal conflicts.

descriptions: The Cutaia Crew is a crew operating under the Lucchese family.
edges.evidence_quote: Cutaia Crew operates in Brooklyn, Queens, and Long Island.

descriptions: Dudley Street Park is listed as an ally of Columbia Point Dawgs in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dudley Street Park, Mission Hill, H-Block, Draper Street, Dorchester Ave Mavericks

descriptions: Insane Unknown Kings killed a Latin Disciple president, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A year later, Chi-Chi D, the Latin Disciple President of KB, was gunned down by Insane Unknowns.

descriptions: A faction of Simon City Royals (Southport and Fullerton) fought a war with Insane Unknowns.
edges.evidence_quote: The Southport and Fullerton Royals were involved in a 'war' with the Insane Unknowns

descriptions: Nocera clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Nocera di Angri

descriptions: Nyamasaria Massive is a splinter group of Baghdad Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Other splinter groups include ChinaSquadNyalenda Base, Chief Squad, Nyamasaria Massive, Kenda Kenda, Kondele Baghdad for Peace, Karamojong Boys, Saba Saba, Artur Margaryan, Kebago, and American Marines.

descriptions: The Casamonica, Spada, Di Silvio, and De Rosa families jointly operated a surveillance system for their criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel gennaio del 2012, ... i Casamonica, ma anche gli Spada, i Di Silvio, i De Rosa, avevano installato all'interno delle abitazioni un sistema di video sorveglianza ...

Texis Cartel.description: Salvadoran criminal organization specializing in drug trafficking, founded in the 1990s by José Adán Salazar Umaña, Juan Umaña Samayoa, and Roberto Herrera. It transported drugs from Colombia through northern El Salvador to North America, bribing law enforcement and officials. The cartel was dismantled by Salvadoran authorities in 2018.

descriptions: Texis Cartel hired 18th Street gang members for intimidation and killings.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel also hired gang members from MS-13 and 18th Street gang to intimidate and kill opponents if necessary.

descriptions: Texis Cartel hired MS-13 members for intimidation and killings.
edges.evidence_quote: The cartel also hired gang members from MS-13 and 18th Street gang to intimidate and kill opponents if necessary.

Wolfpack Alliance.description: Canadian organized crime group founded in 2010 in the Lower Mainland of British Columbia by Hells Angels member Larry Amero and others. It is a loosely allied, multi-ethnic consortium of mostly Millennial-aged gangsters that unites several organized crime groups. The group distributes cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel and operates across Canada, including British Columbia, Ontario, and Quebec. It is still active.

descriptions: Jamie Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Bacon condemned the Wolfpack Alliance together with the Indo-Canadian Brothers' Keepers gang in racist and homophobic language.

descriptions: Wolfpack alliance aligned with the Brothers Keepers.
edges.evidence_quote: He and his crew of Troy McKinnon and Cody Sleigh were Independent Soldiers members, who, along with the rest of the Independent Soldiers gang and the Wolfpack alliance, would become rivals with the Red Scorpions and BIBO gang while aligning themselves with the Brothers Keepers gang.

descriptions: Dhak-Duhre coalition waged war against Wolf Pack.
edges.evidence_quote: waged a war against the Wolf Pack

descriptions: Independent Soldiers were founding members of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Naicker together with another Independent Soldier, James Riarch, became a founding member of the Wolfpack Alliance

descriptions: Sukhvir Singh Deo was a member of both Independent Soldiers and Wolfpack, indicating overlap.
edges.evidence_quote: An Independent Soldier and Wolfpack member, Sukhvir Singh Deo moved to Toronto...

descriptions: The United Nations lists the Wolfpack Alliance as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wolfpack Alliance

descriptions: United Nations and Wolfpack Alliance were engaged in a violent feud.
edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang came to be involved in a violent feud with the Wolfpack Alliance led by Larry Amero and Rabih "Robby" Alkhalil of the Alkhalil family.

descriptions: Shane Maloney, a West End Gang leader, was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Maloney became a key member in the Wolfpack Alliance.

descriptions: Alkhalil family was a member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Other members of the Wolfpack Alliance were the Alkhalil family of Montreal and Ottawa

descriptions: Alkhalil family members joined the Wolfpack, with Nabil serving as liaison to Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack soon took in other members, most notably the Alkhalil family

descriptions: The Alkhalil family is part of the Wolfpack Alliance leadership.
edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang came to be involved in a violent feud with the Wolfpack Alliance led by Larry Amero and Rabih "Robby" Alkhalil of the Alkhalil family.

descriptions: Jonathan Bacon of the Bacon Brothers was a founding member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.

descriptions: Wolfpack Alliance was believed responsible for murder of Gurmit Dhak, leading to conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Sukhveer 'Sukh' Dhak, the younger brother of Gurmit, believed that the Wolfpack gang and that Amero, Riach, and Jonathan Bacon in particular were the ones responsible for his brother's murder.

descriptions: Wolfpack was believed responsible for murder of a Dhak-Duhre member, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Suhhveer 'Sukh' Dhak, the younger brother of Gurmit, believed that the Wolfpack gang and that Amero and Bacon in particular were the ones responsible for his brother's murder.

descriptions: Wolfpack was in a violent conflict with the Dhak-Duhre group, with murders on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: Suhhveer 'Sukh' Dhak, the younger brother of Gurmit, believed that the Wolfpack Alliance were the ones responsible for his brother's murder, and vowed to avenge him.

descriptions: Hells Angels member Larry Amero was a founding member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.

descriptions: Hells Angels member Larry Amero founded the Wolfpack as a side project, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack Alliance was founded in 2010 in the Lower Mainland of British Columbia by the Hells Angels member Larry Amero as a 'side project'.

descriptions: Hells Angels are a component of Wolf Pack.
edges.evidence_quote: Wolf Pack, a gang composed of various factions of the Independent Soldiers, Red Scorpions and Hell's Angels

descriptions: Independent Soldiers members James Riach and Randy Naicker were founding members of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Jonathan Bacon together with Larry Amero of the Hells Angels and James Riach and Randy Naicker of the Independent Soldiers formed a group called the Wolfpack Alliance in 2010.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers leaders were co-founders of the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The other leaders of the Wolfpack Alliance were ... Randy Naicker and James Riach of the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: Independent Soldiers are a component of Wolf Pack.
edges.evidence_quote: Wolf Pack, a gang composed of various factions of the Independent Soldiers

descriptions: The Wolfpack, Red Scorpions, and Independent Soldiers are all active organized crime groups in British Columbia.
edges.evidence_quote: Lindsey Houghton of CFSEU-BC stated: 'We’ve seen and heard the name Wolfpack over the last year . We’ve heard their name come up in places like Kamloops and Surrey. So they are still very active and groups like the Red Scorpions and Independent Soldiers – these groups are still active and prominent in that world.'

descriptions: Red Scorpions leader Jonathan Bacon was a co-founder of the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The other leaders of the Wolfpack Alliance were Jonathan Bacon of the Red Scorpions

descriptions: Red Scorpions are a component of Wolf Pack.
edges.evidence_quote: Wolf Pack, a gang composed of various factions of the Independent Soldiers, Red Scorpions and Hell's Angels

descriptions: The Wolfpack, Red Scorpions, and Independent Soldiers are all active organized crime groups in British Columbia.
edges.evidence_quote: Lindsey Houghton of CFSEU-BC stated: 'We’ve seen and heard the name Wolfpack over the last year . We’ve heard their name come up in places like Kamloops and Surrey. So they are still very active and groups like the Red Scorpions and Independent Soldiers – these groups are still active and prominent in that world.'

descriptions: Wolfpack member Martino Caputo acted as agent for the Rizzuto family.
edges.evidence_quote: Caputo, who officially worked as a property developer ... served as the Rizzuto family's agent for the greater Toronto area.

descriptions: Infobox lists Siderno Group as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Siderno Group

descriptions: The Wolfpack and Siderno Group were engaged in a gang war in Toronto from 2016 to 2018.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack became involved in a gang war in Toronto in 2016-2018 with the Siderno Group.

descriptions: The Sinaloa Cartel lost confidence in the Wolfpack and began operating independently in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Cartel had long had doubts about the competence of the Wolfpack, especially Nero, and decided after his arrest to move into Canada themselves.

descriptions: The Wolfpack Alliance distributed cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack worked as distributors of cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel of Mexico, whose leader was Joaquín Guzmán.

descriptions: Wolfpack distributed cocaine supplied by the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack worked as distributors of cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel of Mexico

descriptions: The Sinaloa Cartel used the Wolfpack as middlemen for drug distribution, then bypassed them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack were used by Guzmán and the Sinaloa Cartel to establish a drug distribution network in Canada, which allowed them to ultimately by-pass the Wolfpack, as the Sinaloa cartel took over the networks that the Wolfpack had established.

descriptions: United Nations gang sided with Dhak-Duhre group against the Wolfpack, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The United Nations gang aligned itself with the Dhak-Duhre group against the Wolfpack.

descriptions: Shane Maloney of the West End Gang was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: A key member of the Wolfpack was Shane Kenneth Maloney of the West End Gang which controls the Port of Montreal.

descriptions: West End Gang member Shane Maloney was part of the Wolfpack Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Other members of the Wolfpack Alliance were ... Shane Maloney of the Montreal's West End Gang

descriptions: West End Gang member Shane Maloney was a key Wolfpack leader, and the West End Gang controlled the Port of Montreal used for smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: A key member of the Wolfpack proved to be Shane Kenneth 'Wheels' Maloney of the West End Gang.

Mkhedrioni.description: Georgian paramilitary group founded in 1989 by Jaba Ioseliani. Involved in the Georgian Civil War and War in Abkhazia, known for criminal activities such as banditry and extortion. Outlawed in 1995 after an assassination attempt on President Shevardnadze, leading to its dissolution.

descriptions: Mkhedrioni opposed the Bagramyan Battalion.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Gamsakhurdia's government in exile , Abkhazia , Bagramyan Battalion , Confederation of Mountain Peoples of the Caucasus

descriptions: Mkhedrioni was led by a former thief-in-law, indicating ties to Georgian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: the Mkhedrioni led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani

descriptions: Los Rodolfos is listed as an enemy of Cártel de Tláhuac in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México SEDENA Ejército Armada Fuerza Aérea Guardia Nacional de México Policía de la Ciudad de México , Grupos Criminales: , Los Rodolfos Unión Tepito , Cartel de Sinaloa

descriptions: SLM (Minnawi) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SLM (Minnawi)
